module.description: Smart lock provider — keypad codes for guest access

host.smartlockId.label: Smart lock ID

host.main.help: Guests receive the keypad code through the Access module when you set primary method to Smart lock and bind this module (provider: nuki). Remote unlock via Nuki Cloud is not active yet — platform connector egress must support POST and Bearer tokens first.
connector.nuki.name: Nuki Cloud API
